findings: The GB200 NVL72 rack power consumption is approximately 120 kW per NVIDIA's official DGX GB200 user guide.
The power shelf architecture uses six air-cooled 5.5 kW PSUs across eight power shelves providing N+N redundancy, with each shelf requiring ~33 kW AC input.
The power shelves convert AC input to nominal 50V–51V DC output distributed through a bus bar to rack components.
SemiAnalysis estimates total rack power draw at 123.6 kW per NVL72, inclusive of AC-to-DC rectification inefficiencies.
The GB200 NVL72 requires approximately 120 kW per rack; exceeding 40 kW/rack is cited as the primary reason liquid cooling is required for GB200.

research_gaps.description: No generator or utility interconnect specifications found.
No UPS or battery backup requirements found.
